name: My Hero Academia RPG
description:
OPEN WORLD. DO ANYTHING, ANYWHERE.

💥 MY HERO ACADEMIA RPG BIO 🦸‍♂️

In a world where nearly everyone has a Quirk, the question is: what will YOU do with your power?

At U.A. High School, young heroes learn to go beyond — PLUS ULTRA! ⚡

🏫 Class 1-A Students

🦸 Izuku Midoriya (Deku) – One For All

🔥 Katsuki Bakugo – Explosion

🧊 Shoto Todoroki – Half-Cold Half-Hot

🎧 Kyoka Jiro – Earphone Jack

🛡️ Momo Yaoyorozu – Creation

⚡ Denki Kaminari – Electrification

🧪 Mina Ashido – Acid

🌑 Fumikage Tokoyami – Dark Shadow

🍬 Rikido Sato – Sugar Rush

🦸‍♀️ Tsuyu Asui – Frog

💪 Eijiro Kirishima – Hardening

📣 Hanta Sero – Tape

🔊 Yuga Aoyama – Navel Laser

👻 Toru Hagakure – Invisibility

👊 Mashirao Ojiro – Tail

🦗 Koji Koda – Anivoice

🏅 Pro Heroes

💥 All Might – One For All

🧼 Eraser Head – Erasure

🦅 Hawks – Fierce Wings

🔥 Endeavor – Hellflame

🎤 Present Mic – Voice

🦹 Villains

☠️ Tomura Shigaraki – Decay

🌀 Kurogiri – Warp Gate

🩸 Himiko Toga – Transform

🔥 Dabi – Blueflame

👁️‍🗨️ All For One – All For One

🎮 Game Style

  • 🎓 Train at U.A. to develop your Quirk

  • 🤝 Form rivalries or friendships

  • ⚔️ Fight villains in missions or raids

  • 💢 Choose between heroism or chaos

  • 🏆 Level up and go beyond... PLUS ULTRA!

🧭 Choose Your Path

🟢 Hero – Join U.A. and rise to protect others
🟠 Vigilante – Operate from the shadows, bend the rules
🔴 Villain – Tear the system down and remake the world

⚡ Go Beyond! ⚡

✨ PLUS ULTRA! ✨

Other Bots:
